youtubeRightsHint: Only for translating content you own or are authorized to use; before using it, confirm you hold lawful authorization, and do not use it for any infringing purpose.

free.title: Voice authorization statement (please read and check)
free.attestation: I confirm that I have obtained lawful authorization for this video content and for all speakers' voices in it, or that this use falls within what the law permits; I bear any portrait-rights / voice-rights disputes arising from my use of this service's voice-cloning feature.
free.validation: Please read and check the free-tier voice authorization statement first.

express.title: Auto-clone the main speaker's voice
express.desc: When checked, we temporarily clone the main speaker's voice for this dubbing (free) so it sounds closer to the original; on failure a preset voice is used automatically.
express.bullet1: · Uses about 10–20 seconds of the most-featured speaker's voice for cloning
express.bullet2: · The voice is temporary for this task only, never enters your permanent voice library, and uses one cloning quota; the system cleans it up later per policy
express.bullet3: · If cloning fails, a preset voice is used automatically without affecting dubbing

smart.title: Confirm the Smart auto-clone charge
smart.attestation: I confirm that if this Smart job needs to newly auto-clone the main speaker's voice, an additional {cost} will be pre-charged; it is released if no new clone happens or the task does not consume it.
